query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image shows a pale sky above a dark horizontal landmass or body of water. A small, narrow vertical dark shape stands near the center of the horizon line, suggesting a distant figure or structure.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred, near-abstract grayscale landscape rendered with almost no fine detail or texture. A pale, muted sky with weak tonal separation fills the upper frame, while the lower half sinks into deep, featureless darkness. A solitary blurred vertical form stands at the horizon, barely perceptible amid the haze. The faded monochrome palette and crushed, oppressive tonal range evoke atmospheric distress, reducing the scene to an abstract meditation on isolation and gloom.
